CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Continued To Jan-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Karla Davis.
Ken A. Chan, Esq. for Plaintiff: Nelita T. Quion, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Nelita T. Quion and against the Defaulted Defendant: Ernie Quion, as follows:
Costs $570.50.
Right to the property located at 454 Sawyer Street, San Francisco.
(See scanned document for details of the judgment and details of the subject property.)
Judgment signed in open court.
